extraction.one_line_summary: GALL Felix attacked with teammate DEWULF from breakaway on final climb, soloed to win by 1:03, taking yellow by 2 seconds over SKJELMOSE
tactical_patterns: AG2R used SCHÄR leadout for GALL's attack from peloton then DEWULF breakaway teammate for bridge support coordination.
BARDET attacked repeatedly final kilometer despite being distanced, showing old form but insufficient W/kg on sustained gradients.
Trek-Segafredo allowed MÄDER 2min gap despite GC threat, suggesting confidence controlling finale or team leadership confusion.
GALL's multiple second places prior signaled peak form incoming; stacked runner-up results reliable predictor of breakthrough win.

rider_signals.GALL Felix: positive: first pro win after string of seconds indicates timing peak perfectly, took yellow by 2sec via attack coordination
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: neutral: dropped multiple times but clawed back for 2nd and 6sec bonus, fighting spirit exceeded climbing legs
rider_signals.AYUSO Juan: negative: went backwards on first half of final climb, dropped from podium to 6th GC
rider_signals.BARDET Romain: positive: most aggressive in months with repeated late attacks, form trending upward but lacking sustained power
rider_signals.SKJELMOSE Mattias: positive: secured 3rd for 4sec bonus, now 2sec off yellow showing tactical awareness for bonuses
